abilities.name: Disease Carrier
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, an enemy model in base contact with this model gains a Blight token.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

abilities.name: Vermin
abilities.text: This model may not gain tokens or declare actions other than Walk and Tangle Together.

actions.name: Tangle Together
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose three other friendly Malifaux Rats within range.
actions.effects: Replace this model and all chosen models with a Rat King. The new model gains a Summon token.
